title: podman-remote stats nonexistent-container: can not unmarshal
body:
```console
$ bin/podman-remote stats idonotexist
Error: types.ContainerStatsReport.Error: decode non empty interface: can not unmarshal into nil, error found in #9 byte of ...|{"Error":{},"Stats"|..., bigger context ...|{"Error":{},"Stats":null}
|...
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
